name: LSP MCP (code intelligence, via Serena)
description: Installs Serena (https://github.com/oraios/serena) and runs it as a long-lived HTTP MCP service, giving MCP clients such as Claude Code semantic code intelligence (find symbol, references, hover, diagnostics, LSP-backed rename) backed by real language servers.

version.description: Version of the serena-agent PyPI package to install.

pythonVersion.description: Python version uv provisions to run Serena.

port.description: Port for the HTTP MCP service.

enableWebDashboard.description: Enable Serena's web dashboard. Off by default in a headless container.

autoRegister.description: Merge an entry into the workspace .mcp.json so MCP clients auto-discover the server. Set false if claude-manager (or another tool) owns .mcp.json.
